description: Long entry when 50-period SMA crosses above 200-period SMA (golden cross) AND volume exceeds its 20-period SMA by 50%. Exit using 2x ATR(14) stop loss or 5% trailing stop (whichever triggers first). Short entry is the inverse (death cross with volume spike).

exit_long.take_profit: 5% trailing stop from highest close since entry

exit_short.take_profit: 5% trailing stop from lowest close since entry

notes: sma_50_prev and sma_200_prev refer to previous candle values. For trailing stop: track highest_close_since_entry for longs and lowest_close_since_entry for shorts. Both exit conditions are monitored simultaneously - whichever triggers first exits the position.
